title: Double Bar Graph to Compare Year-to-Year Data?
excerpt:
I have a board where I track the activity of a contact form on my website. I’m trying to compare the data from 2023 vs 2024. Ideally I would like to be able to visualize this data on a double bar chart.

posts.author: nickb (Nick Bearup)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board where I track the activity of a contact form on my website. I’m trying to compare the data from 2023 vs 2024. Ideally I would like to be able to visualize this data on a double bar chart.

The stacked bar chart doesn’t work because I’m looking for the side by side comparison. I see that double bar graphs are possible by selecting more columns under the Y-axis drop down, but I’m not sure if you can create them the way that I want to.

I’m wondering if anyone has had success with putting data from different years into two different bars on the bar chart?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Nick,

We had a similar request raised in the past that you might find relevant to your current use-case.

Have a check here and let me know if this is along the lines of what you’re looking for
